title: Run Event v2
description: Append-only run event schema with causal links for the AI Coding Workflow. Version 2 — normative.

schema_version.description: Must be exactly 2 for this schema version.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier. Deterministic enough to correlate but unique per append.

parent_event_id.description: Causal parent event ID. Null for the first event in a run.

task_id.description: Task card identifier for this run.

iteration.description: Loop iteration number. Null for non-iteration events.

phase.description: Workflow phase when the event was emitted.

event.description: Event name (e.g. run_start, iteration_start, dispatch_complete, review_complete, decision, stop).

artifact_refs.description: Paths to artifacts produced or consumed by this event. Run-relative where possible.

detail.description: Structured detail object. No semicolon-delimited strings — use proper key-value pairs.
